steps.title: Identify the two key facts in the text
steps.content:
The text introduces two things about the Black Pearl orchestra: (1) it performs classical music, and (2) through the iConduct! program, community members learn conducting basics and then actually conduct the orchestra themselves. The main idea must cover both facts.
  • Choice A — The Black Pearl orchestra performs music from all over the world but mostly performs music composed by Philadelphians.: The text names Beethoven and Jessie Montgomery — no claim is made that most composers are Philadelphians. ✗
  • Choice B — Alvarez founded the Black Pearl orchestra to perform classical music by contemporary artist Jessie Montgomery.: Montgomery is one example; the text does not say the orchestra was founded for her music. ✗
  • Choice C — The Black Pearl orchestra gives community members the chance to both listen to and participate in classical music performance.: Covers both the concerts and the iConduct! conducting opportunity — the full main idea. ✓
  • Choice D — Alvarez has community members conduct an orchestra to demonstrate how difficult the task is.: The text never states that difficulty is the purpose of the program. ✗

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Only the matching choice captures both the listening and the active participation that the text emphasizes. C is correct.
